LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeQuestChain.description: This quest chain will have you track down the shattered remains of a pre-war mobile base crawler, a massive classified fabrication platform built to recover, refit, and manufacture advanced military hardware in the field. If you can reconnect its scattered systems, you may be able to seize its surviving forge lines for yourself.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeQuestChain.label: The Crawler
